eventstream_tab.note: EventStream tab NOW VISIBLE (was not in B28 with charset). Chrome recognized SSE content-type. But 0 events parsed — SSE body content issue.

details.response_tab: Failed to load response data - Request with the provided ID has already finished loading

create_request_error.note: chat_session/create failed with H2 protocol error. This is the second request after completion — may be APF intercepting non-targeted URL.

console_errors: WebAssembly.instantiateStreaming: server MIME type mismatch (x2, unrelated)
details.ui_result: 네트워크를 확인하고 다시 시도하세요.. (Check network and try again)

analysis.charset_removal_effect: POSITIVE — EventStream tab now visible (was hidden with charset=utf-8). Chrome correctly identifies text/event-stream as SSE.
analysis.remaining_issue: EventStream 0 events — the SSE body may not contain properly formatted SSE data (data: prefix + double newline), OR the response completed too fast before streaming could start.
analysis.h2_protocol_error: chat_session/create gets ERR_HTTP2_PROTOCOL_ERROR — APF may be incorrectly intercepting this non-chat URL on the same connection.
analysis.ui_error_source: The '네트워크 확인' error is likely from the failed create request, not from the completion response.
analysis.next_step: B30(#416) adds event: message prefix to SSE data. If EventStream still shows 0 events, the issue may be in H2 DATA frame chunking or the SSE body format itself.

summary: B30 charset 제거 확인: Content-Type이 정확히 text/event-stream으로 변경됨. EventStream 탭이 Chrome에서 처음으로 표시됨(B28에서는 미표시). 그러나 이벤트 0개 — SSE body 형식 또는 H2 스트리밍 문제 잔존. chat_session/create에서 ERR_HTTP2_PROTOCOL_ERROR 발생.
